name: Global Crossing Limited
description: Global Crossing Limited was a global telecommunications company that provided telecommunications services, including IP-based networks, data, voice, and video services, to enterprises, carriers, and mobile operators worldwide. The company operated an integrated global IP network, which connected more than 390 cities in more than 30 countries. Founded in 1997, Global Crossing was domiciled in Bermuda and had administrative headquarters in Florham Park, New Jersey, before being acquired by Level 3 Communications in 2011.
